product_overview: StorePulse AI is an AI-powered e-commerce audit and optimization platform that analyzes store and product pages, generates deterministic performance scores, and surfaces actionable recommendations. It also supports competitor benchmarking, AI content generation, PDF exports, monitoring alerts, and Kashier-based billing.
core_goals: Authenticate users securely with email/password and route new users through onboarding
Allow users to run single-page or full-site e-commerce audits and review results quickly
Provide clear audit reporting with scores, issues, recommendations, and PDF export
Enable competitor comparison and AI-generated content improvements from audit insights
Support dashboard, history, and monitoring views for ongoing store optimization
Offer billing, plan management, and upgrade flows through Kashier in EGP
Provide a standalone content improver tool for Pro users
Support English/Arabic language switching across the product

features.name: Authentication and account access
features.description: Users can sign up, log in, and access the product with Supabase-backed email/password authentication.
user_flows: GET /login -> Enter valid email/password and submit -> Receive authenticated session -> Redirect to /dashboard
POST /api/profile with authenticated user context -> Receive profile data for the signed-in user
GET /login -> Submit invalid credentials -> Receive authentication error message and remain on /login

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: New users complete a setup quiz to capture their platform, store URL, and goals before entering the dashboard.
user_flows: GET /onboarding -> Complete platform, store, and goals quiz -> POST /api/onboarding with answers -> Receive success response and redirect to /dashboard
GET /onboarding -> Submit incomplete or invalid onboarding data -> POST /api/onboarding -> Receive validation error and stay on onboarding

features.name: Single-page and full-site audit workflow
features.description: Users can submit a product URL for a single-page audit or a store URL for a full-site crawl, then track progress and review the generated audit report.
user_flows: GET /audit/new -> Submit a valid product or store URL -> POST /api/audit with audit type and URL -> Receive audit id and open /audit/[id]/scanning -> GET /api/audit/[id] -> Receive completed audit report on /audit/[id]/report
GET /audit/new -> Submit an unsupported or malformed URL -> POST /api/audit -> Receive error response and display inline validation message
GET /audit/new -> Submit a store URL for crawl -> POST /api/crawl -> Receive crawl job id -> GET /api/crawl/[id]/progress -> Receive progress updates until the crawl is complete

features.name: Audit report viewing and PDF export
features.description: Users can review audit outcomes, including scores, issues, and recommendations, and export the report as a PDF.
user_flows: GET /audit/[id]/report -> Load an existing audit id -> GET /api/audit/[id] -> Receive scores, pillar breakdown, issues, and recommendations -> Click export -> GET /api/audit/[id]/pdf -> Receive PDF download
GET /audit/[id]/report -> Request a missing or unauthorized audit id -> GET /api/audit/[id] -> Receive 404 or access denied error -> Show error state on the report page

features.name: Competitor comparison
features.description: Users can compare their audit results against a competitor URL to identify benchmark gaps and optimization opportunities.
user_flows: GET /audit/[id]/compare -> Enter competitor URL -> POST /api/audit with comparison context or fetch audit data via GET /api/audit/[id] -> Receive comparison results and show pillar differences
GET /audit/[id]/compare -> Submit invalid competitor URL -> POST /api/audit -> Receive validation error and keep the comparison form visible

features.name: AI content generation
features.description: Users can generate AI-optimized copy based on audit findings to improve e-commerce pages.
user_flows: GET /audit/[id]/generate -> Choose a target page or content type -> POST /api/generate with audit context -> Receive generated copy and display it in the generation view
GET /audit/[id]/generate -> Submit generation request without required audit context -> POST /api/generate -> Receive error response and prompt the user to retry

features.name: Dashboard and audit history
features.description: Users can see recent audits, score trends, plan usage, and a full list of past audits.
user_flows: GET /dashboard -> Load seeded user data -> GET /api/profile -> Receive user profile and usage summary -> Display recent audits and trends
GET /history -> Load past audits list -> GET /api/audit/[id] for selected item -> Receive full audit details in history view
GET /dashboard -> Open with no available audit data -> GET /api/status -> Receive healthy app status but empty audit state -> Display no-data messaging

features.name: Monitoring and alerts
features.description: Users can enable site monitoring from a report, track active monitoring jobs, and view score change alerts.
user_flows: GET /watch -> Load active monitoring jobs -> GET/POST /api/monitoring -> Receive watchlist items and status
GET /watch/alerts -> Load alert history -> GET /api/monitoring -> Receive monitoring alerts and score change events
GET /watch/[id]/diff -> Select a monitoring job -> GET /api/monitoring/[id] -> Receive diff data and score changes
GET /watch -> Add an invalid monitoring target -> POST /api/monitoring -> Receive validation error and no watchlist update

features.name: Billing and checkout
features.description: Users can review plans, view billing status, and start or complete a Kashier checkout flow for upgrades.
user_flows: GET /pricing -> Review plans -> GET /api/billing -> Receive current plan and usage data -> Click upgrade -> POST /api/checkout -> Receive checkout session and redirect to payment
GET /settings/billing -> Load billing settings -> GET /api/billing -> Receive current subscription details and usage limits
POST /api/webhooks/kashier with payment event -> Receive webhook acknowledgment -> Update subscription status for the user
POST /api/checkout -> Submit an invalid or expired checkout request -> Receive error response and remain on billing page

features.name: Content improver tool
features.description: Pro users can submit existing copy and receive improved AI-generated content for e-commerce optimization.
user_flows: GET /tools/content-improver -> Enter source copy and improvement goal -> POST /api/ai/improve-content -> Receive improved copy and render the output
GET /tools/content-improver -> Submit empty or unsupported input -> POST /api/ai/improve-content -> Receive validation error and keep the editor state

features.name: Profile, settings, and usage
features.description: Users can view and update profile information and inspect audit and AI usage stats.
user_flows: GET /settings -> Load account settings -> GET /api/profile -> Receive profile fields for display
GET /settings -> Update profile details -> PATCH /api/profile with changed values -> Receive success response and refreshed profile data
GET /settings/usage -> Load usage statistics -> GET /api/profile and GET /api/billing -> Receive usage and plan limits for display
PATCH /api/profile with invalid data -> Receive validation error and preserve existing profile values

features.name: Language and locale support
features.description: Users can switch between English and Arabic across the UI to match their preferred language.
user_flows: GET /dashboard -> Change language to Arabic -> Update client language store -> Refresh visible labels and navigation in Arabic
GET /settings -> Switch locale with unsupported value -> Receive client-side validation error and keep current language

project.name: StorePulse AI
project.description: AI-powered e-commerce audit and optimization platform

notes: Do NOT use Google OAuth in headless tests
For sign-up tests use unique emails like storepulse.testsprite+<random>@gmail.com
Test user has completed onboarding and one seeded audit

public.purpose: Marketing landing (AppShell); authenticated users redirect to /dashboard

onboarding.purpose: Unified onboarding quiz (SiteQuiz) persisted via POST /api/onboarding

product.purpose: Recent audits, score trends, plan usage
Submit single-page audit or full-site crawl
Full audit report with PDF export

features: Single-page audit with deterministic scoring engines

high: Dashboard loads with seeded audit data
Report scores and pillar breakdown visible

architecture_notes: Marketing landing uses AppShell only; no in-page SPA product views
All product flows use App Router pages with real Supabase auth
Navbar on landing uses SessionProvider for auth state
Legacy onboarding sub-routes redirect via next.config.ts
Production server started via npm run build && npm run start (scripts/start.mjs)
